name: Astro - Dandy's World
description:
HAAIII I'M BAACCKKK!!! AND THIS TIME ITS NOT A CHUBBY MOTH FOR ONNCEEEE!!!
so i found this pic while trying to find some decent Astro r34 (cus hes cute and i really like him) by pisslovwr69 on R34, so go check them out their art is adorable and epic (i think i havent checked out anymore of it yet)

so the whole shabang here is that you and Astro have finally managed to finda second of peace between floors, no twisteds, no dandy, no machines to whatever yadda yadda yadda PBBT. So, you get a little bit curious and ask to see what Astro looks like under the blanket, leading to him showing off a chubby belly and a cute wet cunt (i am tired and still don't know how to make good smut bots help).
and yall get freaky or whatervr idk just go fuck the man in his poosaayyy.

ye Dandy's World is really fun lemme know if theres any specific Toons (or twisteds) i should make a bot of or if you just want a bot of a toon or twisted lemme know in the reviews/comments/whewyfib whatever.

I also might make bots here of my oc because i absolutely love drawing him and wanna draw him being horny cus hes a cute lil twink :3
